title: 第 55 節
en: Though leaving much behind of what is wor shipped or preached in Hindu temples, in Bud dhist viharas, in Mohammedan mosques, in Jewish synagogues, and Christian churches, each believer may bring down with him into that quiet crypt 378 LECTURE VII.
what he values most — his own pearl of great price :
The Hindu his innate disbelief in this world, his unhesitating belief in another world ;
The Buddhist his perception of an eternal law, his submission to it, his gentleness, his pity ;
The Mohammedan, if nothing else, at least his sobriety ;
The Jew his clinging, through good and evil days, to the One God, who loveth righteousness, and whose name is ' I am' ;

The Christian, that which is better than all, if those who doubt it would only try it — our love of God, caU Him what you like, the infinite, the invisible, the immortal, the father, the highest Self, above all, and through all, and in ah1, — manifested in our love of man, our love of the living, our love of the dead, our living and undying love.

That crypt, though as yet but small and dark, is visited even now by those few who shun the noise of many voices, the glare of many lights, the conflict of many opinions. Who knows but that in time it will grow wider and brighter, and that the Crypt of the Past may become the Church of the Future.

Agni, same as Indra and Vishnu, 290. Agnihotris, or sacrificers, 167. Ahu, Zend, conscience, world, Sanskrit asu, breath, 1 92 note.
zh: 雖然在印度教寺廟、佛教精舍、伊斯蘭教清真寺、猶太教會堂與基督教教堂中所崇拜或宣講的內容，有許多被遺留在後，但每位信徒仍可將之帶入那靜謐的地窖之中。
他所最珍視的——他自己那顆貴重的珍珠：
印度教徒對現世懷有與生俱來的不信任，對彼岸世界則抱持毫不猶豫的信仰；
佛教徒對永恆法則的感知、對其之順服、其溫和、其悲憫；
穆罕默德信徒，若無其他，至少有其清醒；
猶太人無論在順境或逆境，始終緊緊依附於那位喜愛公義、名為「我是自有永有者」的獨一上帝；
基督徒所擁有的，那勝過一切者——若懷疑者願意親身嘗試——即我們對上帝的愛，不論你如何稱呼祂：無限者、不可見者、不朽者、天父、至高的自我，超乎萬有、貫徹萬有、內住萬有——這愛彰顯於我們對人的愛、對生者的愛、對逝者的愛，我們那活潑且永不熄滅的愛。
那間地窖，雖然至今仍狹小陰暗，卻已有少數避開眾聲喧嘩、萬光刺目與意見紛爭的人們造訪。誰能斷言，隨著時間推移，它不會變得更加寬敞明亮？誰又能說，這「過往的地窖」不會成為「未來的殿堂」？

根據您提供的規則，以下是英文原文的繁體中文翻譯： AduA,spn'sh<a Samhitit, 165 註。非洲，充滿動物寓言，115。非洲宗教，其中的較高元素，——魏茨論述，106。
— 其多面性，116。
非洲野人、葡萄牙水手……
根據 Waitz 的分類，非洲部落，68。Ar/ara，神靈的普遍謂詞，不滅，197，272。Agni，ignis，206。

阿耆尼（Agni），與因陀羅（Indra）及毗濕奴（Vishnu）相同。 阿耆尼霍特里（Agnihotris），即獻祭者。 阿胡（Ahu），阿維斯陀語（Zend），意為「良知」、「世界」；梵文（Sanskrit）asu，意為「氣息」。
